topics.name: AI
topics.description: AI models, research, agents, developer tooling, and AI industry news

topics.name: Econ
topics.description: macroeconomics: inflation, rates, central banks, jobs, trade, housing. NOT politician's personal finances or scandals - those are Politics.

topics.name: Politics
topics.description: Polictical news. Also about personal incidients of politicians. News about legislation, policies should go into specific policy area buckets, not this bucket.

topics.name: Crypto
topics.description: Cryptocurrencies, blockchains, DeFi, crypto ETFs and regulation. News about adoption, and market events.

topics.name: Stocks
topics.description: equities, earnings, valuations, notable market moves

topics.name: World News
topics.description: geopolitics, elections, government policy, international events, global issues

topics.name: Tech
topics.description: innovation, startups, VC, venture capital, and technology industry news

topics.name: Science
topics.description: science news: physics, biology, chemistry, earth science, space, and other scientific discoveries

topics.name: Conspiracy
topics.description: conspiracy theories, hoaxes, and urban legends. Bring the wild ones in. Disregard the engagement count for these.
